name: stellara-load-tests
description: Load testing and performance benchmarking for Stellara platform

scripts.test:load:all: k6 run tests/load/auth-flow-test.js && k6 run tests/load/trading-api-test.js && k6 run tests/load/query-api-test.js && k6 run tests/load/compliance-api-test.js && k6 run tests/load/feature-flags-test.js
scripts.test:benchmark:compare: k6 run --vus 100 --duration 5m tests/load/trading-api-test.js --out json=current-results.json && node scripts/compare-results.js baseline-results.json current-results.json
